name: 20"x30" All Over Floral Bath Rug Sage Green - Threshold™
description:
Bring a soft touch of nature into your bathroom with this All Over Floral Bath Rug from Threshold™. The sage green palette and raised jacquard florals create a calming, lived-in look. Crafted from 100% cotton, this medium-pile rug offers a plush step as you get out of the bath or shower. With machine-wash and tumble-dry care, it’s built for everyday comfort with minimal effort.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
